classObjective: Distinguish between accuracy and precision in measurement contexts.
workedExamples: 11-7, Example 1 — Analyze Accuracy and Precision from Data
warmUp: If you measure something as 5.2 cm vs 5.20 cm, what's the difference in precision?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: accuracy vs. precision; approximate error; greatest possible error; measurement quality assessment
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice distinguishing accuracy from precision and calculating measurement error
independentPractice: Practice problems analyzing measurement accuracy and precision and calculating error
assessment: Exit ticket: distinguish accuracy from precision using the example of archery arrows hitting a target
capReflection: Why is it important to understand the difference between accuracy and precision in scientific measurement?
